prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约22959→21371→23567→15669→15099名，2024年位次大幅前移约7900名，2025年继续小幅前移约570名，近两年呈明显上升趋势；2025年基准位次约15099名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划2021年863人、2022年927人、2023年915人、2024年957人、2025年889人；2026年计划949人，较2025年扩招约60人（+6.75%），扩招幅度明显，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65名区间，学校层次稳固；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第52位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度处于正常水平；水利工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程A、环境科学与工程A，均为国家级一流学科；这些王牌专业与该校招生专业高度关联，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，河海大学在上述领域均有布局，相关专业报考热度不减；江苏省2026年物理类考生约37.95万人（较2025年26.06万大幅增长约45.6%），竞争显著加剧；河海大学位于江苏省南京市，为本省211高校，在本省招生规模较大（物理类约900人），本地考生报考意愿较强，省内生源竞争相对激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15099名、2026年扩招6.75%、江苏省物理类考生大幅增长约45.6%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉稳定且工科专业热度持续等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在15710名基础上进一步小幅后移。预测最低位次约15910名，区间15410–16410名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 22959 → 21371 → 23567 → 15669 → 15099. In 2024, the ranking moved forward significantly by about 7900 places, and in 2025, it continued to move forward slightly by about 570 places, showing a clear upward trend in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15099. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province was 863 in 2021, 927 in 2022, 915 in 2023, 957 in 2024, and 889 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 949, an increase of about 60 students (+6.75%) compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 63rd in 2026, with a stable ranking in the 60–65 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively popular), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, and the level of application attention is normal. Water Resources Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, and Environmental Science and Engineering is A, all national first-class disciplines. These flagship majors are highly relevant to the university's enrollment majors and strongly attract high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. Hohai University has a presence in these fields, and the popularity of related majors remains high. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province is approximately 379,500 (a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 260,600 in 2025), intensifying competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and as a provincial 211 university, it has a large enrollment scale in the province (about 900 in Physics Category), with strong local candidate willingness to apply, leading to relatively fierce competition among provincial students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15099, the 6.75% enrollment expansion in 2026, the significant increase of about 45.6% in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province leading to intensified competition, the stable university reputation, and the sustained popularity of engineering majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move back from 15710. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15910, with a range of 15410–16410.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 15910, with a range of 15410–16410. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Dayu Intensive Class) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 15000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 Computer Science or Water Resources Dayu Class. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound (outside 16400) are advised to primarily fill Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2, to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 5951 → 5607 → 5804 → 4751 → 5101. In 2024, the ranking moved significantly forward by about 1053 places, and in 2025, it moved slightly backward by about 350 places, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5101. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province was 205 in 2021, 214 in 2022, 209 in 2023, 209 in 2024, and 256 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 256, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science University Ranking, it is approximately 63rd, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with normal application attention. Water Resources Engineering is A+ (top in China), Civil Engineering is A, and Environmental Science and Engineering is A, all being strong engineering disciplines. History Category majors are mainly in economics, management, law, and literature, which have low correlation with the university's flagship engineering fields, but the 211 platform still strongly attracts liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Accounting/Finance/Auditing, and Chinese Language and Literature are hot or recommended. Hohai University's History Category enrollment covers these directions. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province is about 141,500 (a significant increase of about 45.7% from 97,100 in 2025), leading to intensified competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and is a provincial 211 university with about 256 History Category enrollment slots, making it highly attractive to local examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5101, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 45.7% in History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province leading to intensified competition, the stable university reputation, and the hot liberal arts majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will move slightly backward from 5101. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5251, with a range of 4751–5751.
